latin: Exspecta — totum hoc semper fuit? duo nautae in spatio stabant. primus terram spectavit et rem terribilem intellexit. alter, tormentum tenens, dixit: semper fuit.

questions.prompt: What does the second astronaut reveal?
questions.target: It has always been this way
choices: It has always been this way

translation: Wait — it's all been this the whole time? Two astronauts were standing in space. The first looked at the earth and understood something terrible. The other, holding a gun, said: always has been.
